submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
N=4;w=np.exp(2j*np.pi/N)
Q=np.array([[w**(j*k) for k in range(N)] for j in range(N)])/np.sqrt(N)
golden = Q.conj().T
submissions.construction_method: Conjugate transpose of 2-qubit QFT: QFT_2[j,k]=(1/2)exp(2*pi*i*j*k/4). iQFT = QFT^dagger.
submissions.self_check: U @ U.conj().T = I (4x4), unitary verified, shape (4,4).

submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
N = 32
# Permutation: y -> 2*y mod 15 for y in 0..14, y=15->15
perm = {y: (2*y) % 15 for y in range(15)}
perm[15] = 15
# Build 5-qubit controlled permutation: q0=control, q1..q4=work
U = np.eye(N, dtype=complex)
for inp in range(N):
    q0 = (inp >> 4) & 1
    work = inp & 0xF
    if q0 == 1:
        new_work = perm[work]
        out = (1 << 4) | new_work
        U[:, inp] = 0
        U[out, inp] = 1.0
golden = U
submissions.construction_method: Controlled permutation: q0=control, q1..q4=work register. When q0=0: identity. When q0=1: apply y->2y mod 15 to work register (y=15 is fixed point). Cycles: (1,2,4,8), (3,6,12,9), (5,10), (7,14,13,11), (0), (15).
submissions.self_check: U @ U.conj().T = I (32x32), permutation matrix, unitary verified, shape (32,32).

import numpy as np
N = 32
perm = {y: (4*y) % 15 for y in range(15)}
perm[15] = 15
U = np.eye(N, dtype=complex)
for inp in range(N):
    q0 = (inp >> 4) & 1
    work = inp & 0xF
    if q0 == 1:
        new_work = perm[work]
        out = (1 << 4) | new_work
        U[:, inp] = 0
        U[out, inp] = 1.0
golden = U
submissions.construction_method: Controlled permutation: q0=control, q1..q4=work. When q0=1: y->4y mod 15 to work register (y=15 fixed). Cycles: (1,4), (2,8), (7,13), (11,14), (0), (15). Equivalently cmul2 applied twice.
submissions.self_check: U @ U.conj().T = I (32x32), permutation matrix. Verified cmul4 = cmul2^2 (max diff < 1e-15). Shape (32,32).

submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
I2 = np.eye(2, dtype=complex)
H = np.array([[1,1],[1,-1]],dtype=complex)/np.sqrt(2)
S = np.diag([1, 1j]).astype(complex)
S2 = S @ S  # = Z = diag(1,-1)
# Step 1: H on q0, q1
H0 = np.kron(np.kron(H,I2),I2); H1 = np.kron(np.kron(I2,H),I2)
step1 = H1 @ H0
# Step 2: controlled ops
def ctrl(n, ctrl_q, op, tgt_q):
    N=2**n; U=np.eye(N,dtype=complex)
    for j in range(N):
        bits=[(j>>(n-1-k))&1 for k in range(n)]
        if bits[ctrl_q]==1:
            tgt_val = bits[tgt_q]
            for out_val in range(2):
                amp = op[out_val, tgt_val]
                if abs(amp)>1e-15:
                    ob=bits.copy(); ob[tgt_q]=out_val
                    oi=sum(ob[k]<<(n-1-k) for k in range(n))
                    U[oi,j]=amp
    return U
cu2 = ctrl(3, 0, S2, 2)  # q0-controlled S^2
cu1 = ctrl(3, 1, S, 2)   # q1-controlled S^1
step2 = cu1 @ cu2
# Step 3: iQFT on q0,q1
N=4; w=np.exp(2j*np.pi/N)
Q=np.array([[w**(j*k) for k in range(N)] for j in range(N)])/np.sqrt(N)
iQ = Q.conj().T
step3 = np.kron(iQ, I2)
golden = step3 @ step2 @ step1
submissions.construction_method: QPE of S=diag(1,i) with 2 counting qubits. (1) H on q0,q1; (2) controlled-S^2 (q0->q2) then controlled-S (q1->q2); (3) iQFT on {q0,q1}. Eigenvalue i = e^{i*pi/2} should register phase 0.5 on q0.
submissions.self_check: U @ U.conj().T = I (8x8), unitary verified, shape (8,8).

submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
I2=np.eye(2,dtype=complex)
H=np.array([[1,1],[1,-1]],dtype=complex)/np.sqrt(2)
T=np.diag([1,np.exp(1j*np.pi/4)]).astype(complex)
T2=T@T; T4=T2@T2
# Step 1: H on q0,q1,q2
H0=np.kron(np.kron(np.kron(H,I2),I2),I2)
H1=np.kron(np.kron(np.kron(I2,H),I2),I2)
H2=np.kron(np.kron(np.kron(I2,I2),H),I2)
step1=H2@H1@H0
# Step 2: controlled ops
def ctrl(n,cq,op,tq):
    N=2**n; U=np.eye(N,dtype=complex)
    for j in range(N):
        bits=[(j>>(n-1-k))&1 for k in range(n)]
        if bits[cq]==1:
            tv=bits[tq]
            for ov in range(2):
                amp=op[ov,tv]
                if abs(amp)>1e-15:
                    ob=bits.copy(); ob[tq]=ov
                    oi=sum(ob[k]<<(n-1-k) for k in range(n))
                    U[oi,j]=amp
    return U
cu4=ctrl(4,0,T4,3); cu2=ctrl(4,1,T2,3); cu1=ctrl(4,2,T,3)
step2=cu1@cu2@cu4
# Step 3: iQFT on q0,q1,q2
N=8; w=np.exp(2j*np.pi/N)
Q=np.array([[w**(j*k) for k in range(N)] for j in range(N)])/np.sqrt(N)
iQ=Q.conj().T
step3=np.kron(iQ,I2)
golden=step3@step2@step1
submissions.construction_method: QPE of T=diag(1,e^{i*pi/4}) with 3 counting qubits. (1) H on q0,q1,q2; (2) controlled-T^4 (q0->q3), controlled-T^2 (q1->q3), controlled-T (q2->q3); (3) iQFT on {q0,q1,q2}. Eigenvalue e^{i*pi/4} should register phase 0.125 = 1/8.
submissions.self_check: U @ U.conj().T = I (16x16), unitary verified, shape (16,16).

submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
I2=np.eye(2,dtype=complex)
H=np.array([[1,1],[1,-1]],dtype=complex)/np.sqrt(2)
# Work unitary: multiply-by-2 mod 15
def perm_mul2():
    p={y:(2*y)%15 for y in range(15)}; p[15]=15; return p
p2=perm_mul2()
Uw=np.eye(16,dtype=complex)
for inp,out in p2.items(): Uw[:,inp]=0; Uw[out,inp]=1.0
Uw2=Uw@Uw  # multiply-by-4 mod 15
# Step 1: H on q0,q1,q2
def ins(n,q,g):
    ops=[g if k==q else I2 for k in range(n)]
    r=ops[0]
    for g2 in ops[1:]: r=np.kron(r,g2)
    return r
step1=ins(7,2,H)@ins(7,1,H)@ins(7,0,H)
# Step 2: controlled ops on work register q3..q6
def cwork(ctrl,wop):
    N=128; U=np.eye(N,dtype=complex)
    for j in range(N):
        bits=[(j>>(6-k))&1 for k in range(7)]
        if bits[ctrl]==1:
            wv=sum(bits[3+i]<<(3-i) for i in range(4))
            for ow in range(16):
                amp=wop[ow,wv]
                if abs(amp)>1e-15:
                    ob=bits.copy()
                    for i in range(4): ob[3+i]=(ow>>(3-i))&1
                    oi=sum(ob[k]<<(6-k) for k in range(7))
                    U[oi,j]=amp
    return U
# U^4=identity, so skip q0-controlled
cu2=cwork(1,Uw2); cu1=cwork(2,Uw)
step2=cu1@cu2
# Step 3: iQFT on q0,q1,q2
N2=8; w=np.exp(2j*np.pi/N2)
Q=np.array([[w**(j*k) for k in range(N2)] for j in range(N2)])/np.sqrt(N2)
iQ=Q.conj().T
step3=np.kron(iQ,np.eye(16,dtype=complex))
golden=step3@step2@step1
submissions.construction_method: Shor order-finding for N=15, a=2 (period r=4). (1) H on 3 counting qubits; (2) controlled-U^4 on q0 (identity since 2^4≡1 mod 15), controlled-U^2 on q1, controlled-U^1 on q2, all acting on 4-bit work register; (3) iQFT on counting register. U is multiply-by-2 mod 15 permutation.
submissions.self_check: U @ U.conj().T ~= I (128x128), unitary verified. U^4 = identity confirmed. Shape (128,128).
